vocab.translation: por lo tanto, de ahí que
a la inversa, por el contrario

items.prompt: Elige el conector que mejor encaja:
options: nevertheless
therefore
moreover
items.value: nevertheless

items.prompt: Completa con el conector adecuado:
items.text: The proposal is expensive; ___, it may prove indispensable in the long run.
accepted: nevertheless
items.value: nevertheless

items.prompt: Empareja el conector con su función:
Traduce al inglés: "Algunos prefieren la rapidez, mientras que otros valoran la precisión."
items.source: Algunos prefieren la rapidez, mientras que otros valoran la precisión.
items.value: Some prefer speed, whereas others value accuracy.
accepted: Some prefer speed, whereas others value accuracy.
Some prefer speed whereas others value accuracy.
Some people prefer speed, whereas others value accuracy.
Some prefer speed, while others value accuracy.

items.prompt: Elige el conector que mejor encaja:
options: Conversely
Hence
Furthermore
items.value: Conversely

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The data is robust; nevertheless, the conclusion remains contested.
The data is robust; therefore, the conclusion is settled.
The data is weak, hence the conclusion stands.
items.value: The data is robust; nevertheless, the conclusion remains contested.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: The evidence is persuasive; nevertheless, it would be rash to treat the matter as wholly resolved.

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "El plan es ambicioso; sin embargo, sigue siendo viable."
Elige el conector que mejor encaja:
options: Furthermore
Conversely
Albeit
items.value: Furthermore

items.prompt: Completa con el conector adecuado:
items.text: The costs have soared and demand has fallen; ___, the project is no longer tenable.
accepted: hence
items.value: hence

items.prompt: Lee e infiere la postura del autor: "Granted, the policy curbed emissions; furthermore, it created jobs. The objections, frankly, look thin." ¿Qué postura sostiene?
options: Apoya la política con una concesión menor
Rechaza la política por completo
Permanece neutral sin tomar partido
items.value: Apoya la política con una concesión menor

items.prompt: Empareja el conector con su función:
Traduce al inglés: "La demanda ha caído; por lo tanto, debemos reconsiderar la estrategia."
items.source: La demanda ha caído; por lo tanto, debemos reconsiderar la estrategia.
items.value: Demand has fallen; hence, we must reconsider the strategy.
accepted: Demand has fallen; hence, we must reconsider the strategy.
Demand has fallen, hence we must reconsider the strategy.
Demand has fallen; hence we must reconsider our strategy.
Demand has fallen; therefore, we must reconsider the strategy.

items.prompt: Completa con el conector adecuado:
items.text: The firm automated its records, ___ cutting processing time in half.
accepted: thereby
items.value: thereby

items.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: The reforms are modest; furthermore, they are reversible.
The reforms are modest; conversely, they are permanent.
The reforms are sweeping; hence they are reversible.
items.value: The reforms are modest; furthermore, they are reversible.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Furthermore, the scheme streamlined approvals, thereby sparing applicants weeks of needless delay.

items.prompt: Elige la apertura concesiva que mejor encaja:
options: Admittedly, the cost is high, but the long-term savings outweigh it.
Therefore the cost is high, but the savings outweigh it.
Thereby the cost is high, but the savings outweigh it.
items.value: Admittedly, the cost is high, but the long-term savings outweigh it.

items.prompt: Completa con el conector concesivo (una palabra):
items.text: The findings are promising, ___ preliminary, and warrant a larger trial.
accepted: albeit
items.value: albeit

items.prompt: Ordena el argumento (concesión → tesis): "Aunque cuesta más, sigue siendo la opción más segura."
items.value: While it is true that it costs more, it remains the safest option

items.prompt: Empareja la fórmula con su función:
Traduce al inglés: "Hay que reconocer que el plan es arriesgado; dicho esto, la inacción es peor."
items.source: Hay que reconocer que el plan es arriesgado; dicho esto, la inacción es peor.
items.value: Admittedly, the plan is risky; that said, inaction is worse.
accepted: Admittedly, the plan is risky; that said, inaction is worse.
Admittedly the plan is risky; that said, inaction is worse.
Admittedly, the plan is risky; that said, doing nothing is worse.
Granted, the plan is risky; that said, inaction is worse.

items.prompt: Arma la frase: "Aunque breve, el informe es contundente."
Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: Admittedly the method has flaws; that said, no rival has bettered it.
Admittedly the method is flawless; that said, rivals have bettered it.
Granted the method has flaws, hence rivals have bettered it.
items.value: Admittedly the method has flaws; that said, no rival has bettered it.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: While it is true that the data are incomplete, the underlying trend is too pronounced to dismiss.

items.prompt: Elige el conector formal de concesión (preposición):
options: Notwithstanding
Nevertheless
Whereas
items.value: Notwithstanding

items.prompt: Completa con el conector adecuado:
items.text: ___ the objections raised, the committee endorsed the measure.
accepted: Notwithstanding
items.value: Notwithstanding

items.prompt: Lee e infiere la implicación: "Critics call the tax punitive. This conflates burden with intent: the levy targets pollution, not prosperity." ¿Qué hace el autor?
options: Refuta la crítica distinguiendo dos conceptos
Concede que el impuesto es punitivo
Cambia de tema sin responder
items.value: Refuta la crítica distinguiendo dos conceptos

items.prompt: Traduce al inglés: "Su argumento descansa sobre una premisa endeble que socava toda la conclusión."
items.source: Su argumento descansa sobre una premisa endeble que socava toda la conclusión.
items.value: His argument rests on a shaky premise that undermines the entire conclusion.
accepted: His argument rests on a shaky premise that undermines the entire conclusion.
Her argument rests on a shaky premise that undermines the entire conclusion.
His argument rests on a weak premise that undermines the whole conclusion.
Their argument rests on a shaky premise that undermines the entire conclusion.

items.prompt: Ordena la refutación (concesión → giro): "Aunque convincente a primera vista, el dato no resiste el escrutinio."
items.value: Compelling at first glance, the figure does not withstand scrutiny

items.prompt: Empareja el término con su significado:
Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: Notwithstanding its flaws, the theory accounts for the anomaly elegantly.
Notwithstanding its merits, the theory ignores the anomaly entirely.
Nevertheless its flaws, the theory accounts for nothing.
items.value: Notwithstanding its flaws, the theory accounts for the anomaly elegantly.

items.prompt: Lee en voz alta:
items.text: Granted, no single study is conclusive; taken together, however, the body of evidence is hard to refute.

checkpoint.prompt: Elige el conector que mejor encaja:
options: whereas
therefore
albeit

checkpoint.prompt: Lee e infiere la postura: "That said, the critics raise a fair point about cost; it does not, however, sink the proposal." ¿Qué postura sostiene el autor?
options: Concede una objeción pero mantiene su tesis
Abandona su tesis ante la crítica
Niega que el coste importe en absoluto
checkpoint.value: Concede una objeción pero mantiene su tesis

checkpoint.text: The trial succeeded in the lab; ___, it failed under real-world conditions.
accepted: conversely

checkpoint.prompt: Completa con el conector concesivo breve que une dos adjetivos (una palabra):
checkpoint.text: The reform was effective, ___ slow to take hold.
accepted: albeit

checkpoint.prompt: Traduce al inglés: "A pesar de las objeciones, la junta aprobó la medida; de ese modo zanjó el debate."
checkpoint.source: A pesar de las objeciones, la junta aprobó la medida; de ese modo zanjó el debate.
checkpoint.value: Notwithstanding the objections, the board approved the measure, thereby settling the debate.
accepted: Notwithstanding the objections, the board approved the measure, thereby settling the debate.
Despite the objections, the board approved the measure, thereby settling the debate.
Notwithstanding the objections, the board approved the measure thereby settling the debate.

checkpoint.prompt: Ordena el argumento (concesión → tesis): "Hay que reconocer que es caro, no obstante vale la pena."
checkpoint.value: Admittedly it is expensive nevertheless it is worth it

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: His case is coherent, albeit built on a contested premise.
His case is incoherent, hence built on a sound premise.
His case is coherent, thereby built on no premise.
checkpoint.value: His case is coherent, albeit built on a contested premise.

checkpoint.prompt: Escucha y elige lo que oíste.
options: Conversely, the rural figures point in the opposite direction.
Furthermore, the rural figures point in the same direction.
Hence the rural figures point nowhere at all.
checkpoint.value: Conversely, the rural figures point in the opposite direction.

checkpoint.text: Admittedly, the sample is small; that said, the effect is too consistent to be dismissed as chance.
Whereas his rivals appeal to emotion, she builds a case so tightly reasoned it is hard to refute.
